ValidationRule.description: Earliest Year of Release (year) should be null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(AND(RecordType.DeveloperName ='NonLC', Historical_Transaction_Y_N__c=FALSE, NOT( ISBLANK(TEXT( Earliest_Year_of_Release_year__c )) ) ) , TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Earliest Year of Release Should be Empty!(Because there is No Historical Transaction)
